walkforward_spec.signal_definition: For tradable date t, the exported probability vector is P(z_t | x_1:t-1). Within each refit block the forward recursion updates P(z_t | x_1:t) after observing x_t, then advances one step through the transition matrix for the next tradable date.
walkforward_spec.state_ordering_rule: At each refit, raw states are re-labeled from lowest to highest forward-filtered training mean spy_ret_1d.
walkforward_spec.standardization_rule: Each refit block uses a StandardScaler fitted only on the expanding training window available before that block starts.
